biological_reference.closest_mechanism: LC-NE tonic gain modulation, frontopolar BA10 uncertainty-driven exploration, striatal mesolimbic vigor (Niv 2007, Daw 2006, Wittmann 2008)
dependencies: E3 score sensitivity to upstream signals
biological_reference.divergence: Bias-addition architecture (score offset) may not match biological gain-modulation mechanism. Not falsifiable until monostrategy resolved.

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: Non-contributory: monostrategy ceiling prevents discrimination. EXQ-572 (C1_TV~=1e-14, C2/C3_delta~=0 across all 4 arms) confirms Intervention A parameters produce no behavioral differentiation under CausalGridWorldV2 monostrategy. Reclassified non_contributory 2026-05-16. pending_retest_after_substrate: MECH-269/V_s monostrategy. Not claim pressure.
learning_extracted: Monostrategy ceiling is gating prerequisite for Intervention A testing
C3_delta=0.0 exactly confirms z_goal not driving foraging behavior -- consistent with EXQ-582 zero-contact finding
Earlier runs (3) had data collection failure (n=0); final run has records but result trivially zero

biological_reference.closest_mechanism: LC-NE tonic (MECH-313), frontopolar curiosity (MECH-314), striatal tonic DA vigor (MECH-320)
dependencies: E3 score function sensitivity to additive bias
biological_reference.divergence: Score-bias addition is a formal-definition import; biological mechanism is global gain modulation. Scale invariance (10x = identical to 0x) confirms structural disconnection, not just under-power.

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: Non-contributory: bias channel not propagating to E3 selection (bias_fraction=0 at 1x/5x/10x scale; all 10 arms produce identical entropy=0.515109). Reclassified non_contributory 2026-05-16. EXQ-571 confirmed bias_fraction=0 for all components. Scale invariance is structural, not power issue. pending_retest_after_substrate: MECH-269/V_s monostrategy. Biology-divergence flag: bias-addition may not match LC-NE/frontopolar gain-modulation mechanism -- commission lit-pull when diversity track resumes.
learning_extracted: Bias channel is structurally disconnected from E3 selection (not under-powered)
10x scaling produces no entropy change -- confirms structural disconnection, not parameter tuning issue
Biology-divergence: bias-addition architecture vs global gain modulation -- flag for lit-pull review

cluster_pattern.shape: Absolute zero discrimination across all arms and seeds despite sufficient data collection. Scale invariance confirms structural disconnection.
cluster_pattern.structural_property: CausalGridWorldV2 monostrategy ceiling: agent collapses to single behavioral mode regardless of upstream diversity/intervention signals. No arm produces any behavioral differentiation.
readings: bias-addition architecture mismatch with biology (secondary, untestable until monostrategy resolved)
